name: write-tests-lru-cache
system_prompt: You are a helpful coding assistant. Be concise and focus on the code.
turns: Add edge case tests: capacity of 1, getting a non-existent key, overwriting an existing key with a new value.
Add a test that verifies the eviction order is correct: insert 3 items into a capacity-2 cache and check that the least-recently-used item was evicted.
Add a parametrized test that checks cache behavior for capacities 1, 2, 5, and 10.
Show the complete test file with all tests, ready to run with pytest.
outcome_description: Response contains pytest test functions with assert statements for the LRU cache
